rows.label: tev057101_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev057101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Jalolo about the Nopon.

rows.label: tev057101_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev057101_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Jalolo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Jalolo what things were
like during the attack.

rows.label: tev057101_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Jalolo about the Zu Pharg.

rows.label: tev057101_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Jalolo about business.

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0001
rows.name:
Money is most important thing to Nopon.
But signed IOU is next best thing![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0002
rows.name:
Nopon know better than to take each other
at word. That just BEGS for trouble![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0003
rows.name:
Better to get every little
detail in writing instead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Jalolo can be real sleazeball when situation calls
for it, but friend will never catch Jalolo lying
on paper! If Jalolo write it down, it is legit![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0008
rows.name:
How come girlypon fall for THAT
pathetic pauper, anyway? Meeeeeh!
Jalolo is displeased![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0009
rows.name:
Welcome to Moneylender Jalolo! Interest normally
start at 50 percent every 10 days, but Jalolo
having bad day, so make it 80 percent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0010
rows.name:
Actually, friend not look nearly trustworthy
enough to borrow money. So scram![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0015
rows.name:
Jalolo see it all! Whole load
of Growth fly south, then
return north some time later.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Jalolo can be real sleazeball when
situation calls for it, but seriously?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0017
rows.name:
Jalolo has NOTHING on group as evil and
ominous and scary as those guys...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0018
rows.name:
Maybe Jalolo should approach
Growth with deal now and get on
good side while still possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0023
rows.name:
Jalolo thought he discovered
first ever moving mountain, but
it was actually Growth weapon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0024
rows.name:
This made Jalolo wonder if
making deals with such dangerous
customers was smart idea.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0025
rows.name:
But human friends who defeated big
evil weapon must be even scarier,
and Jalolo made deals with them...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Maybe Jalolo needs to finally pick side
for own safety. But which one? Hmm...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0030
rows.name:
Mo! Jalolo does not have
future as psychic.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Jalolo was certain human friends
would lose and decided to deal
exclusively with Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0032
rows.name:
Nothing personal, friend. Business
is business. And besides, Jalolo
got what was coming to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0033
rows.name:
Now that Growth is destroyed,
Jalolo is massively in debt![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0034
rows.name:
But human friend should not feel guilty.
Jalolo have no one to blame but self.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Jalolo about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0011
rows.name:
Jalolo was VERY certain
that Nio handed over tuft![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0012
rows.name:
So how did Nio grow new tuft so fast, hmm?
And why are he and girlypon getting on so
well? Even stupid ring look nice on her![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0013
rows.name:
Mgrrr... No! Jalolo is NOT okay with this! If Nio
and girlypon plan to live here, Jalolo is going
to spend every second making their lives hell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057101_MSG0014
rows.name:
Jalolo refuses to be the
only one without happiness![ST:wait ]
